Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to inform email content.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching input keywords, retrieving channel data, video metadata, and subscriber counts.

Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Captures the full state of all active agent projects in one pull, ensuring the weekly update reflects the most current data without manual copy-paste.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Transforms the raw sheet data into a clean, structured, human-readable weekly summary organized by status, highlighting what's new, in progress, and completed.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Converts a dense spreadsheet into a polished update that leadership can read in under a minute, saving the time it would take to manually interpret and format the data.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Sends the formatted weekly agent tracker update to the designated recipients on a scheduled basis.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Ensures every stakeholder receives a consistent, readable update each week without anyone needing to manually compile or distribute the report.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle spec via a HubSpot form, which triggers a lookup against the DFC parts catalog to retrieve all parts associated with that make, model, and year.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Replaces a manual catalog search that could take 30–60 minutes per vehicle with an instant, automated lookup triggered by a simple form submission.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Compares the catalog results against current DFC inventory to identify what is stocked and what is missing, then structures the findings into a clean, formatted output ready for Excel export.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces an accurate gap analysis in seconds that would otherwise require a specialist to cross-reference multiple systems manually.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed Excel file showing DFC's stocked parts and identified inventory gaps for the specified vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a ready-to-use catalog file directly to Mark's inbox, enabling immediate customer conversations or purchasing decisions without any follow-up requests.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory data for all parts on the weekly backorder report, including on-hand quantity, on-order status, and in-transit shipment details.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a process where a dozen people each manually look up part statuses, consolidating all lookups into a single automated pull that takes seconds.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the existing backorder report by appending live inventory status columns and flagging any parts that have no on-hand, on-order, or in-transit source — marking them as dead-ends.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Gives the team a single enriched document that shows the full picture for every backordered part, eliminating the need to cross-reference multiple systems or chase down colleagues for status updates.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backordered parts, pre-populated with the relevant status, expected dates, and any dead-end flags requiring escalation.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Enables the team to send accurate, professional customer updates in a fraction of the time, reducing customer-facing delays and internal back-and-forth.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor listings including make, model, year fitment, and part specifications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects competitor and market catalog data in minutes that would take days to compile manually, ensuring the reference sheet is comprehensive and current.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped rotor fitments against DFC's existing parts inventory and compiles all findings into a structured, formatted reference sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Produces a clear gap analysis showing exactly where DFC has coverage and where market opportunities exist, enabling faster and more confident product decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand data on two-piece rotor fitments where DFC currently has no coverage.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Generates real demand signal from actual customers to prioritize which gaps are worth filling, replacing guesswork with data-driven inventory decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Connects to all active Meta (and TikTok) ad accounts and retrieves the full ad copy text from every live ad, including headlines, body copy, and descriptions.
Meta Investigation.impact: Instantly pulls every word of live ad copy across all accounts, replacing a tedious manual review that would require clicking through dozens of campaigns and ad sets.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all retrieved ad copy for specified phrases or flagged terms, identifies exact matches, and records the ad ID, field name, and verbatim copy where each match appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Surfaces every instance of a flagged phrase across all active ads in seconds with pinpoint accuracy, eliminating the risk of missing a match in a large ad library.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted email report listing every flagged ad with the exact field and verbatim copy where each phrase match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, actionable compliance or quality report directly to the requester, enabling immediate review and correction without requiring platform access.

summary: The automation pipeline is in strong shape this week, with 55 total agents across the board — 27 completed, 11 in progress, and 17 planned. No new agents were added this week, and no agents changed stages, so the pipeline remains steady from last week. The team continues to make solid progress working through the 11 active builds, with a healthy backlog of 17 planned agents ready to move forward as capacity opens up. Great work to everyone keeping this momentum going!
